R
ROSClaw
DocsGitHubDiscord
Standardizing the Future of Robotics

Software-DefinedEmbodied AI.

The AUTOSAR + Android for the robotics industry. ROSClaw unifies hardware morphologies, algorithms, and data formats into a single, scalable Operating System.

rosclaw@agibot-g01: ~/ros2_ws
$
Waiting for input...bash

Write Once. Embody Anywhere.

The same agent logic runs seamlessly across heterogeneous robot morphologies.

agent.py
from rosclaw import EmbodiedAgent

# Connect to ANY robot running ROSClaw OS
agent = EmbodiedAgent.connect("robot_ip")

# Semantic task - no hardware specifics
task = "Navigate to kitchen, pick up cup, place on table"

# ROSClaw auto-maps to embodiment:
# 🤖 Humanoid | 🐕 Quadruped | 🛞 Wheeled
agent.execute(task)
20 DOF • e-URDF Semantic Mapping • VLA Policy

One Unified Standard. Zero Fragmentation.

Breaking down silos. Establishing a unified embodied AI standard.

Cross-Embodiment

Semantic-HAL

Powered by e-URDF. Map high-level semantic intents to local hardware dynamics automatically. Your code runs seamlessly on wheeled, quadruped, or bipedal robots without modification.

Cross-Tool

Embodied MCP

Native Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration. Every camera, LIDAR, and robotic arm API is instantly translated into standard JSON schemas for LLMs to consume and command.

Cross-Algorithm

Brain-Cerebellum Router

The ultimate bus linking 1Hz LLM reasoning with 100Hz+ VLA control policies. Ensure soft-real-time execution with dynamic authority handovers.

Cross-Format

Unified Trajectory Engine

OS-level data interception. ROSClaw automatically time-syncs and packages heterogeneous sensor data and LLM CoT into standard RLDS/HDF5 formats. Ready for Open X-Embodiment training.

Brain-Cerebellum Architecture

Dynamic routing between 1Hz LLM reasoning and 100Hz+ VLA control

React Flow
Press enter or space to select a node.You can then use the arrow keys to move the node around. Press delete to remove it and escape to cancel.
Press enter or space to select an edge. You can then press delete to remove it or escape to cancel.

The Built-in Data Flywheel

Self-evolving intelligence at the OS level

Data Flywheel
Self-Evolving at OS Level

One Command to Rule Your Robot

Zero configuration. Native ROS 2 compatibility. Ready in 60 seconds.

零配置，原生兼容 ROS 2，60 秒就绪

bash
$ curl -sSL https://rosclaw.io/install.sh | bash
⚡ROS 2 Humble / Iron / Jazzy
🔒Local-first, Private by Default
📦Auto MCP Discovery
🔄Built-in OTA Updates

“The era of hardcoded state machines is over. Install the ROSClaw kernel and let the LLM take the wheel.”

Join the OS Revolution for Robotics.

Stop building custom state machines. Start building intelligent agents.
